title: Sadly Missed Memorial Heart Ornament with Diamantes & Embossed Roses – Stone-Effect Standing Grave Decoration with Inscription – Graveside, Cemetery & Garden Remembrance Tribute Keepsake
features: HEARTFELT REMEMBRANCE – Features the words “Sadly Missed” with the comforting inscription: “Deep in our hearts you’ll always stay, loved & missed every day”; a thoughtful way to honour a loved one at a grave, headstone or memorial garden

STONE-EFFECT DETAILING – Neutral light grey speckled finish with dark, engraved-style lettering; embossed roses on the left and a floral spray on the right set with two subtle diamantes for a gentle shimmer that suits any resting place
COMPACT & PRACTICAL SIZE – Approx. W14cm x L12.5cm x D6.5cm; weight around 300g; substantial yet easy to position beside flowers, vases, plaques and lanterns without crowding the graveside
STABLE FLAT BASE – Freestanding wedge-style base sits securely on grass, soil or gravel and makes light work of moving the ornament when tending flowers or cleaning the memorial area
GIFT-BOXED SYMPATHY PRESENT – Supplied in a printed box for safe storage and presentation; a thoughtful condolence gift and lasting keepsake for remembering beloved parents with dignity and care
LOW-MAINTENANCE CARE – Smooth speckled surface wipes clean in seconds to help keep the resting place neat alongside fresh or artificial flowers, lanterns and other cemetery ornaments
description: Share a simple, dignified tribute with this Sadly Missed Memorial Heart . The front bears the words “Sadly Missed” and the tender inscription “Deep in our hearts you’ll always stay, loved & missed every day.” The sentiment is set in dark engraved-style lettering that’s clear and respectful to read from a considerate distance, providing comfort at the graveside, cemetery plot, headstone or in a quiet space at home. The heart has a classic stone-effect speckled grey finish to blend naturally with surrounding memorials. An embossed rose motif decorates the left side, while a delicate floral spray on the right is accented with two diamantes , adding a soft shimmer without distracting from the message. This neutral, timeless styling complements flowers, lanterns and grave plaques. Crafted from sturdy, weather-resistant polyresin , the ornament is designed for year-round outdoor display. The flat wedge base keeps it freestanding and stable on grass, soil or gravel, and the smooth surface wipes clean in moments to help maintain a neat resting place. Measuring approximately W14cm x L12.5cm x D6.5cm and weighing around 270–300g , it is compact yet substantial—easy to place beside a headstone or memorial vase without overcrowding the area. A considerate choice for bereavement, this remembrance keepsake offers a lasting way to say they are forever in our hearts.
